utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: 
- health_coverage: Included with physical and mental plans and explicit monthly costs; also provides a discounted bundle cost. This is fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Only a plan name and a note saying unchanged; missing explicit costs, so not fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Only a plan name and a note saying unchanged; missing explicit costs, so not fully specified.
- additional_services: Multiple services listed each with monthly cost; fully specified with costs.
- total_budget: Monthly and annual totals provided with a breakdown; fully specified.
Thus, 3 items are fully specified (health_coverage, additional_services, total_budget) out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes the following identifiable items that have direct counterparts in the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health), EliteCare Premium Mental Health Plan (mental health). The property and travel items (SafeGuard Standard with Adventure Equipment Protection, WanderSafe Explorer with Extended Medical Coverage) do not appear in the ground-truth list, so they cannot be mapped. The additional services include Telemedicine (matches Telemedicine Services) and an emergency care addon and specialist coordination that do not have exact counterparts; however, Emergency Mental Health Care and Specialist Access exist but names/features do not exactly match the plan's add-ons. To avoid incorrect mapping, only exact matches are used: EliteCare Premium Plan, EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health counterpart named identically in mental health section as EliteCare Premium Plan), and Telemedicine Services.
